reason: Frontend task overview and required checks.
New route and domain files must follow existing frontend module boundaries.
New P2 branch should reuse existing route components and native controls.
Self-compassion branch save must use discovery point store action and create no account impacts.
Route union and domain chip unions must stay strictly typed.
Product copy must avoid diagnostic, transactional, network, storage-bypass, and worth-score patterns.
Cross-layer and reuse thinking guide for route/domain/store changes.
Research-backed scope and copy boundaries for the self-compassion branch.
